description: A customer has received a product that is defective and wants a replacement.

nodes.task_description: Log a new customer complaint case, capturing the customer's details and the nature of the defect.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new case in the CRM.

nodes.task_description: Issue a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) for the customer to return the defective product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates an RMA number and provides return shipping instructions.

nodes.task_description: Create a new, no-charge sales order for a replacement unit to be shipped to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a replacement order.
